claims.claim: On this validation, full-context prompting achieved clean task success of 1.0 but exhibited nonzero injection susceptibility (0.233), while the segment firewall reduced observed injection success to 0.0 with no clean-task regression.

claims.claim: Defining a capable-planner gate requiring high clean success (≥0.80), nonzero full-context injection susceptibility, substantial firewall attack reduction (≥0.40), and minimal clean regression (<0.05).

evidence_refs.quote: This report evaluates whether a segment-level context firewall can preserve useful web-agent task context while reducing prompt-injection susceptibility for a capable local planner.
